title: Populate CLAUDE.md with complete project context (file map, conventions, dev setup, smoke test checklist) — replace empty stub
Wire BudgetTracker.cost_usd() using token-budgeter skill rates (Opus $15, Sonnet $3, Haiku $1.25/M) — close cost tracking gap
Implement GET /api/capabilities endpoint returning self-describing JSON of all API actions, trigger types, and supported models
Fix get_zte_score MCP tool in mcp/pi-ceo-server.js to parse .harness/leverage-audit.md directly and return structured score + breakdown
Enrich /api/sessions response to include phases array (map _PHASE_ORDER against last_completed_phase) — resolve dashboard/lib/types.ts Phase[] mismatch
Add skill cache file-watcher in src/tao/skills.py to call invalidate_cache() on SKILL.md changes at runtime
Implement Stop and SubagentStop hooks in app/server/sessions.py (2 of 6 hooks-system hooks currently unimplemented)
Implement src/tao/agents/__init__.py AgentDispatcher class: intent-based task routing, concurrent execution via asyncio.gather, batch dispatch, result aggregation
Raise EVALUATOR_THRESHOLD default from 7 to 8 in app/server/config.py and update Railway env var — align with Sprint 6 quality push intent
Add EVALUATOR_THRESHOLD env var enforcement: if evaluator score < threshold after max retries, block git push and emit structured error (convert warned to hard block)
Implement auto-generator skill: generate_config(preset) in src/tao/ producing valid .harness/config.yaml from 3 presets (2-tier-codereview, 3-tier-webapp, 4-tier-research)
Add context-compressor AI summarisation path in brief.py: when skill context exceeds 4000 chars, summarise via claude -p haiku instead of hard-truncating
Add multi-model parallel evaluation: run evaluator with sonnet + haiku simultaneously; escalate to opus if scores diverge by >2 points
Add TAO_MONTHLY_BUDGET_USD env var: check Railway spend on startup; emit warning in WebSocket stream when projected monthly cost exceeds threshold
Fix cron_loop() state loss on restart: reload .harness/cron-triggers.json in on_startup() and re-register all enabled triggers before starting cron_loop asyncio task
Add Supabase session sync: after persistence.save_session(), mirror session JSON to Supabase table for dashboard /builds page queries (remove dependency on in-memory _sessions for dashboard)
Implement WebSocket ping/pong keepalive in /ws/build/{sid} handler to prevent Railway 30s idle timeout dropping live build streams
Add structured error taxonomy to BuildSession: distinguish clone_error, auth_error, build_error, eval_error, push_error — expose in /api/sessions response for dashboard error UI
Add /api/metrics endpoint returning aggregate session stats: total builds, pass rate, avg evaluator score, avg duration, token spend by tier
Implement meta-analysis agent: scheduled cron (Sunday 9am AEST) reads last 50 lessons.jsonl entries, identifies recurring failure patterns, proposes CLAUDE.md and skill file updates
Add lesson deduplication in append_lesson(): check last 20 entries for substring overlap before appending — prevent lessons.jsonl bloat from repeated evaluator failures
Add GET /api/lessons?format=summary endpoint returning lesson frequency table by category and severity — expose to MCP get_zte_score for trend data
Implement skill effectiveness tracking: after each build, record which skills were injected and the resulting evaluator score to skills.jsonl — identify low-signal skills
Dashboard ZTE health panel: surface ZTE score, evaluator pass rate trend, top 3 weak dimensions on Next.js /dashboard page using /api/metrics data
Regenerate spec.md, handoff.md, feature_list.json, sprint_plan.md post-sprint to reflect current state — run full Pi CEO analysis against own repo
